rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 32px; margin-left: 399px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 62px; margin-left: 409px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: Perpetual governance mechanism for verifiable knowledge

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 713px; height: 1px; padding-top: 500px; margin-left: 35px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

br.style: padding: 0px; margin: 0px; color: rgb(236, 239, 241); font-size: 11px; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;

span.font:
Dual-path architecture maintaining operation under partial failure. Even under partial failure,
knowledge circulation does not stop; the system transitions into a reduced but stable mode.

Emergencies:
“Observe the situation, identify issues,
and continue with minimal decision-making and action”
